title: Design System Demo
description: A miniature design system — color tokens, a type scale, and three components — rendered as a self-contained artifact that honors the host theme.

artifact.purpose: Demonstrate the artifact content type in production docs: a self-contained HTML page that embeds in the content area, opens full-page at /artifacts/<path>, and follows the site's light/dark theme.

typography.sans: system-ui humanist stack — headings and prose

artifact.data: No external data — a fixed set of tokens, a four-step type scale, and three demo components (buttons, badges, cards).
artifact.interactions: Honors data-theme propagated by the host frame on load and on every site theme toggle; has its own toggle for the full-page view; falls back to prefers-color-scheme with no host.
